title: Docker Config
description: Adds a Dockerfile, compose.yaml, and nginx.conf to the project

applicationName.description: The application name, used for the Docker image and service name

backendName.description: The backend service name, used for the BACKEND_HOST env var in the Dockerfile
backendName.x-prompt: What is the backend service name?

port.description: The host port to expose in compose.yaml
port.x-prompt: What host port should be exposed in compose.yaml?
